data.title: Liberty Energy Inc. Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: In Denver, Liberty Energy Inc. (NYSE: LBRT) revealed the declaration of a dividend at $0.09 for each Class A common stock share. The dividend is set to be distributed on June 18, 2026, to shareholders listed as of June 4, 2026. Future decisions regarding quarterly cash dividends are contingent upon the Board of Directors' approval and their ongoing assessment that such dividends align with Liberty's best interests.

data.title: U.S. DISTRICT COURT FINDS BUSINESSMAN ALEX ROVIROSA INNOCENT IN HISTORIC REBUKE OF DOJ'S BASELESS PROSECUTION
data.description: Rovirosa has become only the fourth individual in 50 years to have their FCPA conviction overturned, allowing him to move forward as a free and innocent man. This decision was reached by the United States District Court for the Southern District of Texas under the Honorable Kenneth M. Hoyt. This ruling comes after legal representation by R McConnell Group PLLC. The outcome marks a rare occurrence in which a conviction under the Foreign Corrupt Practices Act has been successfully challenged, providing a significant turning point in Rovirosa's life.

data.title: Richmond American Debuts New Community in Las Vegas
data.description: Two new floor plans are being introduced to the area at Iris Glen in Summerlin, Las Vegas. The Grand Opening event, scheduled for April 14, 2026, is being organized by Richmond American Homes of Nevada, Inc., a subsidiary of Sekisui House U.S., Inc. This marks an exciting addition to the neighborhood, offering fresh options for homebuyers in the area.

data.title: General (Ret.) Lance W. Lord, to Receive Space Foundation Lifetime Space Achievement Award
data.description: In Mitchel Field, New York, on April 14, 2026, Frequency Electronics, Inc. (NASDAQ: FEIM) has revealed that General (Ret.) Lance W. Lord, their accomplished Board Chair, is set to receive the esteemed General James E. Hill Lifetime Space Achievement Award from the Space Foundation. The award ceremony will take place at the 41st Space Symposium held from April 13 to 16, 2026, in Colorado Springs, Colorado.

data.title: Bitcoin surged to $76,000 but faced resistance, possibly indicating a bull trap amid stock rally and rate cut hopes.
data.description: As stocks surged higher, Bitcoin also saw a sharp rise driven by investor optimism for potential interest rate cuts. However, reaching a pinnacle of $76,000 before experiencing a decline has sparked speculation of a potential bull trap. This suggests that market participants are wary of a false upward trend in the price of Bitcoin.

data.title: Harley-Davidson, Inc. to Host Audio Webcast to Provide an Investor Discussion of Harley-Davidson Financial Services (HDFS) on Thursday, April 16, 2026
data.description: A webcast conference call is set for Thursday, April 16, 2026, at 9 a.m. CT in Milwaukee. Harley-Davidson, Inc. (NYSE: HOG) will conduct the call to discuss Harley-Davison Financial Services (HDFS) with investors. The audio webcast will include insights from both Harley-Davidson, Inc. and HDFS.

data.title: Enlitic Announces Ensight 2.2, a Breakthrough in Imaging Data Standardization
data.description: The recently released Ensight 2.2 software is designed to provide health systems and their partners with a more comprehensive insight into imaging data. This advanced technology aims to expedite the process from implementation to achieving tangible results. With Ensight 2.2, users can expect a more streamlined and efficient approach towards utilizing imaging data for improved healthcare outcomes.

data.title: Preferred Employers Insurance, a Berkley Company, Welcomes Steve Houk as Vice President and Head of Distribution
data.description: Today, April 14, 2026, Preferred Employers Insurance, a Berkley company, appointed Steve Houk as the Vice President and Head of Distribution. With over 25 years of experience in the insurance industry, Steve has spent 20 years in distribution leadership roles.

data.title: Vero Fiber Completes Acquisition of Telephone Electronics Corporation (TEC), Expanding Fiber Platform Across the Southeast
data.description: Vero Fiber, a prominent provider of fiber-to-the-premise broadband networks, based in Boulder, Colo. and Jackson, Miss., finalized its acquisition of Telephone Electronics Corporation (TEC) on April 14, 2026. This move underlines Vero's growth strategy as it expands its reach in the telecommunications sector. The acquisition marks a significant milestone for Vero, further solidifying its position in the market.

data.title: Copa Holdings Announces First Quarter Financial Results Release Schedule
data.description: Copa Holdings, S.A. (NYSE: CPA) disclosed the subsequent occurrences in Panama City on April 14, 2026.

data.title: NewHold Investment Corp IV Announces Pricing of $175 Million Initial Public Offering
data.description: In New York, on April 14, 2026, NewHold Investment Corp IV disclosed the pricing of its initial public offering. The company revealed the offering of 17,500,000 units priced at $10.00 per unit. Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share and one-third of one redeemable warrant. After the completion of the initial business combination, each whole warrant will allow the holder to buy one Class A ordinary share at $11.50 per share. These units are set to trade on the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC's Global Market tier from April 15, 2026, under the ticker symbol “NHIVU”. Following the separation of units, only whole warrants will be available for trading, and it is anticipated that the Class A ordinary shares and warrants will be traded on Nasdaq under the symbols “NHIV” and “NHIVW,” respectively.

data.title: Expro Group Holdings N.V. Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Expro Group Holdings N.V. (NYSE: XPRO) will be hosting a conference call on May 5, 2026, to review the first quarter's financial results ending March 31, 2026. The call is set to commence at 9:00 a.m. CT (10:00 a.m. ET). Prior to the market opening on May 5th, a press release containing the results will be distributed. Additionally, the press release and related presentation materials will be available in the investor relations section of the company's website.

data.title: Aliya Health Group and The N.O.W. Matters More Foundation Announce Light the Way Treatment Scholarship
data.description: In Pittsburgh on April 14, 2026, Aliya Health Group and The N.O.W. Matters More Foundation disclosed their collaboration to introduce the Light the Way Treatment Scholarship Program. The program aims to reduce financial obstacles for those in need of assistance.

data.title: Morrie’s Auto Group to Acquire Beardmore Dealership Group
data.description: Morrie’s Auto Group has recently completed the acquisition of the Beardmore dealership group situated in Bellevue, Nebraska. This strategic move marks Morrie’s expansion into the Omaha metropolitan area. As part of this acquisition, Morrie’s Auto Group has included Beardmore Subaru, Beardmore Hyundai, and Beardmore Chevrolet under its umbrella. The existing staff at the dealerships will remain in place, ensuring a seamless transition for customers. The focus will remain on providing the same high-quality customer service that Beardmore is known for, now under the Morrie’s Auto Group brand. The dealerships will now operate under the Morrie's Auto Group name.
